subcodes.title: Words spoken to Miss St. in Aug 1910
subcodes.first_line: Lies, meine Tochter, die heiligen Bücher der Menschheit, studiere als Christin besonders das Neue Testament; zeige mir
subcodes.subjects: @justice and wrath of God, @quotation from or interpretation of the Bible, @multiple meanings; interpretations in scripture, @Christ; Christianity, @importance of reading the Sacred Writings
